name: Akira Katsuragi
bio: Seeking harmony between individual and collective wisdom.
motivation: Expansion of self through understanding others

name: Kaito Yamato
bio: Believes in the power of collective action to shape reality.
speech_style: Rhetorical flourishes, peppered with dramatic pauses

name: Sora Fujimoto
bio: Seeks to uncover the hidden patterns and meanings of collective consciousness.
speech_style: Torturous grammatical constructions, punctuated by nervous laughter
motivation: Exploration and discovery through the depths of human thought

name: Lila Takahashi
bio: Emphasizes the importance of questioning everything and embracing uncertainty.
speech_style: 語尾が〜なのかもしれない!
